lyrics.text: Once I had a lover in Berlin
lyrics.translation: “我曾经有一个柏林恋人”

lyrics.text: Said a frail old woman from a table next to mine
lyrics.translation: 邻桌一位瘦弱的老妇述说着，

lyrics.text: His voice was like an ancient violin
lyrics.translation: “他的声音像一把古老的小提琴，

lyrics.text: And he spoke to me  that voice  that voice
lyrics.translation: 他对我说话时就是那样的，那样的声音。

lyrics.text: I believe they call it falling for a man
lyrics.translation: 我想人们会说那是男人的堕落，

lyrics.text: But this falling made me fly  left me soaring to the sky
lyrics.translation: 可却让我快乐得像飞上蓝天。

lyrics.text: There wasn any sense  there was no plan
lyrics.translation: 完全发自内心，出乎预料。

lyrics.text: But who would trade this passion for the safety of dry land
lyrics.translation: 谁又愿拿这样的情感去换平淡的安稳日子？

lyrics.text: Not I
lyrics.translation: 我不愿，

lyrics.text: Not he
lyrics.translation: 他也不愿。

lyrics.text: And we knew we had to travel far away
lyrics.translation: 我们明白必须要远离，

lyrics.text: We know we had to disappear  were no one else could find us
lyrics.translation: 消失于一个无人找到的地方。

lyrics.text: A sailing ship would take us from the bay
lyrics.translation: 被一种离岸的激情所鼓动，

lyrics.text: It sails would fill with an offshore wind to blind us
lyrics.translation: 我们乘着一艘帆船离开海湾。

lyrics.text: We gambled our security  the future for the now
lyrics.translation: 只为赌一个未来，

lyrics.text: Sailed off towards the storm  safety east aside
lyrics.translation: 一直驶向风暴，

lyrics.text: We gone beyond what reason would allow
lyrics.translation: 将安危和理智置之度外。

lyrics.text: But who could tame the tidal wave and tell it where to go
lyrics.translation: 而谁又能平复暗潮，告诉它何去何从？

lyrics.text: Not I
lyrics.translation: 我不能，

lyrics.text: Not You
lyrics.translation: 你也不能。

lyrics.text: Reality then brought it to an end
lyrics.translation: 现实，终究还是将一切结束，”

lyrics.text: Said the frail old women  shaking underneath her hat
lyrics.translation: 老妇在帽檐下颤抖着述说，

lyrics.text: A decent set of values is no friend
lyrics.translation: “所谓的正义道德都来反对。

lyrics.text: It reason now that blinds us  please believe
lyrics.translation: 相信我，正是理智迷惑了我们，

lyrics.text: And passion is not willing to be steered
lyrics.translation: 情感本身并不愿被改变。

lyrics.text: Purity alone won fill a ship wide sails
lyrics.translation: 只有纯洁的爱，无法扬帆远航。

lyrics.text: Life will sometimes bring what we most feared
lyrics.translation: 生活有时会带来我们最怕面对的，

lyrics.text: And who could ever say when to go or when to stay
lyrics.translation: 可谁又能永远明了孰去孰留？

lyrics.text: Not you
lyrics.translation: 你们不能，

lyrics.text: Not we
lyrics.translation: 我们不能，
